name: French-Style Cream Cheese Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in the bread machine.
2. Set the machine to dough setting.
3. When the dough is finished, divide it into 8 pieces.
4. Flatten each piece with a rolling pin into about a 6-inch circle.
5. Spread about half a cup of thawed mixture on each flattened piece.
6. Fold the dough over and seal the edge with a fork.
7. Prick the top of each piece a few times.
8. Place the pieces on a lightly greased baking sheet.
9. Bake at 375°F for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
Note: One batch of dough is enough to make 8 Chicken Broccoli Pockets. Since the Chicken Packet recipe uses only 1/4 cup mixture per roll instead of half a cup, I freeze enough chicken mixture in bags to make 10 Chicken Packets by quadrupling the Chicken Packet recipe and freezing it in three bags instead of four. Two pieces are set aside for my children to shape and bake with the Chicken Packets. My children enjoy helping by dipping the packets into milk and crumbs before placing them on the baking sheet.
